title: Marketplace Manager - DTDC Global Group - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - DTDC Global Group - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Join the DTDC Global Group family as a Marketplace Manager in Faridabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About DTDC Global Group:
DTDC Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DTDC Global Group!
